goals: Create a thread draft about data conversion techniques (CSV to JSON conversion and Python generator-based stream reading)
Schedule the thread for optimal posting time using Typefully's queue
List all drafts to verify the thread was created and scheduled correctly

user_agent_config.personality: Analytical and methodical; prefers precise, technical content; values efficient data processing workflows.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Does not know Typefully tool names or API parameters; describes goals in natural language and expects the assistant to handle technical details.

end_condition: User has created and scheduled the data science thread and verified it appears in the drafts list with scheduled status.
